18+9F.llm_explanation: 18 + 9F in base-16 is equivalent to 24 + 159 in base-10, which equals 183. Converting 183 back to base-16 gives B7.**

79+8B.llm_explanation: 79 (base-16) is 121 (base-10) and 8B (base-16) is 139 (base-10). Adding these gives 260 (base-10), which is 104 in base-16.**

A6+94.llm_explanation: A6 (166 in decimal) + 94 (148 in decimal) = 314 in decimal, which is 13A in hexadecimal.**

A8+F4.llm_explanation: A8 (168 in decimal) + F4 (244 in decimal) = 412 in decimal, which is 19C in hexadecimal.**

53+C2.llm_explanation: 53 + C2 in base-16 is equivalent to 83 + 194 in base-10, which sums to 277. Converting 277 back to base-16 gives 115.**

C0+AF.llm_explanation: C0 (192 in decimal) + AF (175 in decimal) = 367 in decimal, which is 16F in hexadecimal.**

EA+4A.llm_explanation: EA (234 in decimal) + 4A (74 in decimal) = 308 in decimal, which is 134 in hexadecimal.**

C2+47.llm_explanation: C2 (194 in decimal) + 47 (71 in decimal) = 265 in decimal, which is 109 in hexadecimal.**

29+99.llm_explanation: 29 (base-16) is 41 in decimal, and 99 (base-16) is 153 in decimal. Adding these gives 194 in decimal, which is C2 in base-16.**

E6+D9.llm_explanation: E6 + D9 in base-16 is calculated as (14*16 + 6) + (13*16 + 9) = 230 + 221 = 451 in base-10, which converts to 1BD in base-16.**

82+AC.llm_explanation: 82 (130 in decimal) + AC (172 in decimal) = 302 in decimal, which is 12E in hexadecimal.**

67+55.llm_explanation: 67 (103 in decimal) + 55 (85 in decimal) = 188 in decimal, which is BE in hexadecimal.**

45+18.llm_explanation: 45 + 18 in base-16 is equivalent to 69 in base-10, which is 5D in base-16.**

E6+FD.llm_explanation: E6 + FD = 1E3 in base-16. Adding the digits, 6 + D (13) = 19, which is 13 in base-16 (with a carry of 1). Adding E (14) + F (15) + 1 (carry) = 34, which is E (14) in base-16 with a carry of 2. The final result is 1E3.**

A8+8F.llm_explanation: A8 (168 in decimal) + 8F (143 in decimal) = 311 in decimal, which is 137 in hexadecimal.**

BB+2A.llm_explanation: BB (187 in decimal) + 2A (42 in decimal) = 229, which is E5 in hexadecimal.**

A3+8A.llm_explanation: A3 (163 in decimal) + 8A (138 in decimal) = 301 in decimal, which is 12D in hexadecimal.**
